commands.review_summary:
The PR caps embedded-agent compaction reserve and keep-recent token budgets against a known model context window and updates related tests, config help/types, and gateway docs.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +33, Docs +2. Total +50 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can leave reserveTokens and keepRecentTokens over the usable prompt budget even when contextTokenBudget is known. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and local test commands can write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR with compatibility-sensitive config semantics; a human reviewer should accept the runtime capping behavior before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): cap compaction budgets for small contexts
target.body:
## Summary

- cap embedded-agent compaction reserve when the known model context window would otherwise leave no usable prompt budget
- cap keep-recent tokens to the prompt budget remaining after reserve for small and mid-sized contexts
- update config help/types and gateway config docs to document context-window caps

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed after the final rebase.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/gateway/config-agents.md src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts` - passed after the final rebase.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts` - passed after the final rebase.
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` - passed on AWS Crabbox, provider `aws`, lease `cbx_3f05641b1e85`, run `run_15c19941ee08`, exit 0.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: small-context runs no longer retain impossible compaction `reserveTokens` or `keepRecentTokens` budgets when `contextTokenBudget` is known.
Real environment tested: focused local static checks in a Codex worktree plus AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/gateway/config-agents.md src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts`; `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.
Evidence after fix: a 16k-context profile resolves to reserve `8,384` and keep-recent `8,000`; configured over-budget values are capped to the available context window; changed `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs` lanes passed remotely on AWS Crabbox run `run_15c19941ee08`.
Observed result after fix: formatting, lint, whitespace, typecheck, import-cycle, and changed guard proof passed; the Crabbox wrapper reported `leaseStopped=true`.
What was not tested: live Ollama generation for this patch; the changed behavior is the embedded-agent settings normalization layer. `pnpm docs:list` was not rerun locally because the linked Codex worktree attempted direct pnpm dependency reconciliation and hit `[ERR_PNPM_ABORTED_REMOVE_MODULES_DIR_NO_TTY]`.
target.author: vincentkoc
